plan_review_notes: Approved protocol-definition scope: define FeatureChangeArtifact as the first concrete composite artifact protocol in docs, lock slots/invariants/verification/promotion/invalidation/envelope semantics, and keep implementation-versus-target-model boundaries explicit.

plan_review_history.notes: Approved protocol-definition scope: define FeatureChangeArtifact as the first concrete composite artifact protocol in docs, lock slots/invariants/verification/promotion/invalidation/envelope semantics, and keep implementation-versus-target-model boundaries explicit.

spec_review_notes: Spec frozen for documentation-only protocol definition. The task introduces docs/feature-change-artifact.md as the concrete FeatureChangeArtifact protocol and updates the architecture docs to treat it as the next design lock.

normal_cases.name: `FeatureChangeArtifact` is documented as one coherent protocol with explicit slots and composition rules.

edge_cases.name: The protocol demonstrates both named slots and collection slots and distinguishes candidate, verified, promotable, and stale states.

exception_cases.name: The protocol explains how stale inputs and invariant failures should force reverify, reassemble, or reapproval instead of generic retry.
